rows.label: qev086402_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ugh, will you STOP
PACING around already?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0002
rows.name: Yes, ma'am![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0003
rows.name:
So what's the big deal about
this Dodonga Caravan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0004
rows.name:
Nopon are nomadic people.
Travel in caravans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0005
rows.name:
Caravans are named after Nopon
leader at time caravan is formed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0006
rows.name:
So this is a caravan established
by a Nopon named Dodonga?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0007
rows.name:
Yes. Dodonga is great heropon
who made even greater caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0008
rows.name:
But what's any of that got
to do with you, Tatsu?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0009
rows.name: Everything to do with Tatsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0010
rows.name:
Tatsu was born in Dodonga Caravan.
Mamapon still live there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0011
rows.name:
Your mother's there? Why haven't
you gone to see her before this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0012
rows.name: Caravan moves every few days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0012_2
rows.name:
And Tatsu lose track of Dodonga
Caravan after being captured.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0013
rows.name:
Tatsu could not go back for
visit even if Tatsu wanted to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0014
rows.name:
But now that you know where it
is, are you going to go back?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0015
rows.name: Now Tatsu is pillar of BLADE community![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0016
rows.name:
If Tatsu leave, entire city
could come crashing down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0017
rows.name: Orrrr maybe no one would notice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0018
rows.name: Mo! Mean Lin-san is mean![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0019
rows.name:
All right, you two. Let's go pay
this caravan a visit together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0020
rows.name: It can be a goodwill tour of sorts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0021
rows.name:
Hey, yeah! I wanna see
where Tatsu comes from![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_JNK0010
rows.name: Nod

rows.label: qev086402_SEL0011
rows.name: Say it sounds like fun.

rows.label: qev086402_JNK0020
rows.name: Groan

rows.label: qev086402_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say you don't want to meet
a whole pack of Tatsus.

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0022
rows.name:
I'm curious to see what a
Nopon caravan is like.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0023
rows.name:
Do you live in trees
like big fat squirrels?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0024
rows.name: Right? Imagine this, but way more of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0025
rows.name:
Somehow Tatsu feeling
friends not really excited.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0026
rows.name: What? No! We're...thrilled.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0027
rows.name: Okay then. Tatsu is ready.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0028
rows.name:
Ready to confront demons of past...
Ready to face uncertain future...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0029
rows.name: Ready to visit Mamapon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086402_MSG0030
rows.name: What a little drama queen.[ST:wait ]
